sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed
before = last_transition.before_frame
after = last_transition.after_frame
ascii_b = before.ascii.split('\n')
ascii_a = after.ascii.split('\n')
changed = []
for r in range(64):
    for c in range(64):
        if ascii_b[r][c] != ascii_a[r][c]:
            changed.append((r, c, ascii_b[r][c], ascii_a[r][c]))
print(f"Changed cells: {changed}")

# I need to fundamentally rethink. Let me look at ALL transitions so far
print("\n=== Full transition history ===")
for i, t in enumerate(transitions):
    print(f"\nTransition {i}: {t.action}")
    print(f"  board_changed={t.result.get('board_changed')}, gameplay_changed={t.result.get('gameplay_changed')}")
    # Count changed cells
    bf = t.before_frame.ascii.split('\n')
    af = t.after_frame.ascii.split('\n')
    n_changed = sum(1 for r in range(64) for c in range(64) if bf[r][c] != af[r][c])
    print(f"  cells_changed={n_changed}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
